title: Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Niva Bupa South Asia Partners:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners!
